zh.Bakewell, Derbyshire, England: 英國德比夏爾貝克韋爾_
zh.Meynell Langley, Derbyshire, England: 英國英格蘭德比夏爾明日香 密爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Emma Meinill於大約1166年出生在英國英格蘭德比夏爾時，她的父親Robert Meynell IV10歲，母親Agnes Langley9歲。她與Matthew de Hathersage結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1218年在英國德比夏爾李斯享年54歲。

zh-hans.Bakewell, Derbyshire, England: 英国德比夏爾貝克韋爾_
zh-hans.Meynell Langley, Derbyshire, England: 英国英格兰德比夏爾明日香 密爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Emma Meinill于大约1166年出生在英国英格兰德比夏爾时，她的父亲Robert Meynell IV10岁，母亲Agnes Langley9岁。她与Matthew de Hathersage结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1218年在英国德比夏爾李斯享年54岁。

nameMeanings.name: Emma
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, originally a short form of compound names such as Ermintrude containing the word erm(en), irm(en) ‘entire’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, but its popularity in medieval England was greatly enhanced by the fact that it had been borne by the mother of Edward the Confessor, herself a Norman. In modern times, it was only in moderate use early in the 20th century but rose sharply in favour in the 1970s and has since remained perennially popular.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

en.lifeSummary: When Emma Meinill was born about 1166, in Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Robert Meynell IV, was 10 and her mother, Agnes Langley, was 9. She married Matthew de Hathersage. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died about 1218, in Lees, Derbyshire, England, at the age of 54.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Emma Meinill est née environ 1166, à Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert Meynell IV, avait 10 ans et sa mère, Agnes Langley, avait 9 ans. Elle a épousé Matthew de Hathersage. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1218, à Lees, Derbyshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 54 ans.

de.Meynell Langley, Derbyshire, England: Langley Mill, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Emma Meinill um 1166 in Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert Meynell IV 10 und ihre Mutter Agnes Langley 9. Sie hat Matthew de Hathersage geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb um 1218 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Lees, Derbyshire, England.

Lei sposato Matthew de Hathersage. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì circa 1218, nel Lees, Derbyshire, England, all'età di 54 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Emma Meinillが約1166年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアで生まれた時，父Robert Meynell IVは10歳，母Agnes Langleyは9歳であった。Matthew de Hathersageと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1218年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアリーズで54歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Emma Meinill(이)가 대략 1166년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Meynell IV(은)는 10세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes Langley(은)는 9세였다. 그녀는 Matthew de Hathersage(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1218년 영국 더비실르 리스에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Emma Meinill родилась около 1166 г. в местности дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Robert Meynell IV было 10 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Langley, 9. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Matthew de Hathersage. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла около 1218 г. в местности лись, дирбишир, Англия в возрасте 54 лет.
